symbolic_system.boundary: Typed review-consumer decision that transitions a packet from pending_review to admitted_test_artifact.

carrier.carrier_state: ratify_candidate decision with passing promotion and reflexive gates
carrier.carrier_state_space: decision types, lifecycle transitions, gate findings, action token, warrant, witness artifacts
carrier.maintainer: CDP review consumer and review-decisions directory

use_episode.use: Ratify a candidate as an admitted test artifact after review gates pass.
use_episode.inference_drawn: The candidate may move to admitted_test_artifact status, not automatically to production graph status.
non_inferences: Admitted test artifact equals production graph admission.
Gate pass proves the domain claim.

binding.binding_target: candidate lifecycle status under review-promotion runtime

validity.validity_criterion: Decision type, gate pass status, warrant, witness attestation, and lifecycle transition cohere.
validity.validity_evidence: Decision type is ratify_candidate; promotion gate pass true; lifecycle transition reason states both gates passed.
validity.confidence: high for runtime decision shape; bounded for production consequence
validity.uncertainty: External model review is explicitly not integrated in Wave 5 MVP.

scope.scope_conditions: The candidate associated with the primitive_move_review_protocol packet and its admitted-test lifecycle transition.

recognition_authority.recognizer_standing: Review consumer has standing over review decision emission; runtime has uptake standing; promoter standing remains downstream.
recognition_authority.authority_source: Wave 5 review-promotion runtime and review consumer contract.
recognition_authority.uptake_path: review packet -> ratify_candidate decision -> admitted-test artifact

policy_license.attempted_consequence: Admit candidate to production graph from ratify_candidate decision.
policy_license.action_policy: Both promotion and reflexive gates must pass independently.
policy_license.license_basis: Passing gates, warrant, action-token uptake, and witness attestation.

transmission.transmission_path: review packet -> review decision JSON -> admitted-test artifact path

verdict.next_check: Validator should warn that promotion/admission is licensed while chain is not all_links_licensed.

reflexive_pressure.notes: Positive decisions still need claim ceilings because valid local gates do not license broader production consequences.

symbolic_system.boundary: Admission record linking a kernel node candidate, operator instruction, gate result, source evidence, and admitted node reference.

carrier.carrier_state_space: node ids, gate pass/fail, operator instruction refs, admitted node refs, route traces, witness artifacts
carrier.maintainer: CDP kernel admission runtime and admitted graph/kernel directories

use_episode.use: Admit a kernel node candidate under an operator instruction and kernel gate.
use_episode.inference_drawn: The named node is admitted under the kernel admission rule and source evidence envelope.
non_inferences: The admission licenses unrelated kernel nodes.
The operator instruction licenses all future uses.
The node is beyond later correction.

binding.binding_target: one kernel node candidate and its admitted-node reference

validity.validity_criterion: Admission requires matching node id, source evidence, operator instruction, route trace, and passing kernel gate result.
validity.validity_evidence: Record contains decision kernel_admit, admitted_node_ref, operator_instruction_ref, source_evidence_ref, and kernel_gate_result.
validity.confidence: high for admission-record structure; unassessed for all future downstream implications
validity.uncertainty: The record summary does not independently verify source-evidence sufficiency.

scope.scope_conditions: The named thermodynamic degradation kernel node and the specific operator instruction envelope.

recognition_authority.recognizer_standing: Admission standing is distributed across operator instruction, gate result, schema shape, and promoter execution.
recognition_authority.uptake_path: operator instruction -> kernel gate -> admission record -> admitted node ref

policy_license.action_policy: Kernel admission gate plus operator instruction envelope.
policy_license.license_basis: Passing gate, matching source evidence, operator instruction, and node identity.
blocked_consequences: raising all related claims to kernel status
dropping route trace or source evidence

transmission.transmission_path: kernel node candidate -> gate result -> admission record -> admitted node file

verdict.claim_ceiling: empirical truth certification for thermodynamic degradation
verdict.next_check: Validator should warn on overclaiming truth/empirical ceiling and draft licensed status.

review.promotion_authority: kernel gate and promoter within operator-instruction envelope

reflexive_pressure.notes: Kernel admission shows why standing is not a single recognizer property.

symbolic_system.system_name: CDP ladder mechanism map move output
symbolic_system.boundary: Output of move.ladder_mechanism_map describing source and target levels, mechanism families, weakest link, and packet claim ceiling.

carrier.carrier_state: ladder mechanism map with cross_level_map, mechanism_family, weakest_link_in_chain, and packet_claim_ceiling
carrier.carrier_state_space: source and target levels, side statuses, mechanism families, cross-level mappings, weakest-link fields

use_episode.use: Represent a cross-level derivation map without overclaiming derivation closure.
use_episode.inference_drawn: The move output can guide review of cross-level mechanism structure within its packet claim ceiling.
non_inferences: The cross-level map proves the target claim.
The weakest link has been repaired.

binding.binding_target: cross-level mechanism relation and claim ceiling

validity.validity_criterion: The output preserves source level, target level, mechanism family, weakest link, and packet claim ceiling fields.
validity.validity_evidence: Output contains cross_level_map, mechanism_family, packet_claim_ceiling, source and target status fields, and weakest_link_in_chain.
validity.uncertainty: The move does not establish final derivation validity or close all open possibilities.

scope.scope_conditions: The single derivation_ladder_structuring_protocol run and its mapped source-target relation.

recognition_authority.recognizer_standing: Move runner has standing to emit mechanism metadata; reviewers/promoters must separately assess whether the derivation chain licenses downstream use.
recognition_authority.authority_source: derivation ladder structuring protocol and move output contract.
recognition_authority.uptake_path: ladder move output -> review packet -> possible derivation revision or admission

distributed_standing.standing_scope: only later admission if chain is licensed

policy_license.attempted_consequence: Use cross-level map as a derivation guide.
policy_license.action_policy: Packet claim ceiling and weakest-link residue constrain downstream use.
policy_license.licensed_consequence: Use as derivation guide after stripped metadata.
policy_license.license_basis: Successful move output contract and explicit packet claim ceiling.

transmission.transmission_path: ladder move output -> review packet -> derivation review

unlicensed_links: closure and admission are not licensed by map output alone

verdict.next_check: Validator should warn on licensing after scope metadata stripping.

reflexive_pressure.notes: This record makes metadata survival the central consequence-license issue.

symbolic_system.boundary: Aggregate packet that collects move outputs, action tokens, review questions, witness artifacts, and graph-admission authorization status for one protocol run.

carrier.carrier_state: review packet with action tokens, candidate outputs, move chain, witness artifacts, and graph_admission_authorized false
carrier.carrier_state_space: protocol ids, candidate output maps, move-output paths, review policy flags, witness records, admission authorization fields
carrier.maintainer: CDP runtime dispatcher and review queue filesystem

use_episode.use: Route a completed move chain into review without admitting it to the graph.
use_episode.inference_drawn: The packet is eligible for review consumption but does not itself authorize graph admission.
non_inferences: Review eligibility is equivalent to production promotion.

binding.binding_target: one runtime protocol run and its candidate move outputs

validity.validity_criterion: Packet accurately preserves move outputs, action tokens, witness artifacts, and admission authorization flags from the run.
validity.validity_evidence: The JSON contains 15 action tokens, 15 move outputs, promotion_review_eligible true, and graph_admission_authorized false.
validity.confidence: high for runtime shape; not assessed for domain truth of the candidate outputs
validity.uncertainty: The record does not independently verify each witness artifact or move output.

scope.scope_conditions: The specific primitive_move_review_protocol run identified by review_packet_id.

recognition_authority.recognizer_standing: Review consumer has standing to consume the packet for a review decision; promoter standing is downstream and not granted by packet presence.
recognition_authority.authority_source: CDP runtime review policy and dispatcher output contract.
recognition_authority.uptake_path: move outputs -> review packet -> review consumer -> decision artifact

distributed_standing.standing_scope: emit review packet from a completed run
consume packet into typed review decision
only later promotion or refusal after decision and gates

policy_license.attempted_consequence: Treat the packet as ready for review and possible downstream decision.
policy_license.action_policy: Review packet policy with graph_admission_authorized false.
policy_license.licensed_consequence: Review consumption and decision generation only.
policy_license.license_basis: Review eligibility, packet shape, witness artifacts, and explicit non-admission flag.

transmission.transmission_path: move execution -> review packet JSON -> review consumer

unlicensed_links: promotion is not licensed by packet alone

verdict.next_check: Validator should not warn merely because a draft source has restricted license and explicit blocked consequences.

review.promotion_authority: review consumer only; no production promoter authority

reflexive_pressure.notes: The packet is operative and consequential, but the licensed consequence is narrower than downstream promotion.
